title: paronychia americana subsp. pauciflora
intro: Paronychia americana subsp. pauciflora is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Nyctaginaceae, commonly known as the desert four o'clock. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Paronychia americana subsp. pauciflora include treating wounds, skin infections, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from fever and pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into a tea or infused in oil to extract its medicinal compounds.
